findings.title: TLS certificate validation disabled in HTTP agent
findings.evidence: Line 3 of raw diff adds `rejectUnauthorized: false` to agentOptions object. This explicitly disables certificate validation on HTTPS requests, allowing man-in-the-middle attacks and accepting invalid/expired certificates. No conditional logic or environment-guard present in the diff.

notes: The change is minimal and isolated to a single file. Diff Drift's flag is correctly identified and severity is appropriate.
No mitigating context visible in the diff (e.g., this is not a development-only flag, environment variable check, or temporary staging measure).
Branch name 'agent/fix-staging-webhooks' suggests intent to handle staging, but disabling TLS globally is not an acceptable staging fix — should use environment-specific configuration instead.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
